completion_summary: Removed the residual heat-policy phrase and deleted Task Lab's duplicate semantic validator. Centralized effective operation bounds and choices in the core Gym contract; made invalid payloads fail closed; locked solvent, catalyst, and extractant categories only after the first real charge; coupled extractant identity to partition and risk physics; made repeated seed charges cumulative across material, phase, process, and equipment ledgers; regenerated deterministic golden trajectories and semantic-invariance evidence. Ruff, strict MkDocs, 1105 full-suite passes plus the 4 corrected golden reruns, and 12 semantic-invariance paired runs pass.
notes: Benchmark remains pre-final. Existing frozen method evidence is historical and was not relabeled; future formal method comparisons must run against this updated world law.
scope: Remove residual heat-policy prompting and move verified operation semantics, effective bounds, categorical recipe locks, extractant choices, and cumulative seed accounting into the core Gym contract
